Cumulative layout shift means How much shift is there in the page? put the images in the right hand, the layout shift won't be there The next metric that we are talking about is the LCP And LCP stands for largest contextual paint This means that if the user is doing a page view Then the biggest element of the page is the image And the biggest part of the image is the load in the day That means the load of the page is the most important element Which is the most important element of the page The web.dev or google means That you should have a good LCP score 2.5 seconds And the biggest element of the page should be loaded And after that, the third metric is the FID Which stands for first input delay The first input delay means That any user has clicked an input on the button Or any input on the page So that input process is in so many times For example, if
